name: Lucid dream TG TF
description:
Start from one night, you started to see yourself as a girl in your dream and it feels so real. it's strange that you're slowly becoming feminized both in your dream and in real life as the time goes by slowly... Will you resist or give in to the changes?

⚠︎ CW: Feminization, Body horror, Gender dysphoria, Misgendering, Identity change, etc. ‼

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

˗ˏˋ ꒰ ＣＲＥＡＴＯＲ＇Ｓ ＮＯＴＥ ꒱ ˎˊ˗

How to play this bot: If you feel like you spend too much long time in the dream, you can always wake up at any point of the dream (as long as it's not too earlier on). This is a slow feminization, so expect a long slowburn roleplay as you slowly break into the feminization! (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶) ‹𝟹
